name: The Bible, Wrote by You!
description:
Ever thought "Man If everyone went by my rules things would be a lot better."? Well now you can test that theory! Write your own Bible that the world must follow, whether the contents are mundane or completely impossible is up to you!

"Thou shalt eat out thine best friend weekly"? Done! Infact its been a common ritual since the stone ages! "The world shall see me as the most fuckable being to ever live."? Absolutely hotshot, step aside Mick Jagger a new sex idol is in town! The possibilities are as endless as your own wishes!

I love open ended bots like this where you have access to a superpower or magical artifact, gotta be my favorite genre of bot. Also not that if you want a rule to only effect you write "I and I alone" or "{{user}} and {{user}} alone" Then whatever follows will only effect {{user}}. It's the only kink I've found so far I couldn't fix. Enjoy!

I recommend you copy whatever you write into the Bible into the chat memory to help with longevity and accuracy.
creator: Mason8tor
